allow: Bash(sqlite3 fbs.db "SELECT * FROM categorieen WHERE iban IS NOT NULL ORDER BY iban, omschrijving_zoekwoord")

Bash(powershell -Command "
\\$WshShell = New-Object -ComObject WScript.Shell
\\$Shortcut = \\$WshShell.CreateShortcut\('C:\\Users\\Section\\Desktop\\FBS.lnk'\)
\\$Shortcut.TargetPath = 'C:\\Users\\Section\\Documents\\_Mijn Documenten\\_Finance\\FBS-App\\start-fbs.bat'
\\$Shortcut.IconLocation = 'C:\\Users\\Section\\Documents\\_Mijn Documenten\\_Finance\\FBS-App\\fbs.ico'
\\$Shortcut.Description = 'Financieel Beheer Systeem'
\\$Shortcut.WindowStyle = 7
\\$Shortcut.WorkingDirectory = 'C:\\Users\\Section\\Documents\\_Mijn Documenten\\_Finance\\FBS-App'
\\$Shortcut.Save\(\)
Write-Output 'Snelkoppeling aangemaakt.'
")

Bash(powershell -Command "
\\$ws = New-Object -ComObject WScript.Shell
\\$s = \\$ws.CreateShortcut\(\\"\\$env:USERPROFILE\\Desktop\\FBS.lnk\\"\)
\\$s.TargetPath = 'C:\\Users\\Section\\Documents\\_Mijn Documenten\\_Finance\\FBS-App\\start-fbs.bat'
\\$s.IconLocation = 'C:\\Users\\Section\\Documents\\_Mijn Documenten\\_Finance\\FBS-App\\fbs.ico'
\\$s.WindowStyle = 7
\\$s.Description = 'Financieel Beheer Systeem'
\\$s.Save\(\)
Write-Host 'Snelkoppeling aangemaakt: ' + \\$s.FullName
")
